registered_primary.measure: Kaplan-Meier Estimate of Secondary AVF Patency
registered_primary.timeFrame: Median time from AVF creation to AVF abandonment (secondary patency), assessed up to 1 year.

registered_primary.measure: Number of Participants With AVF Use for Hemodialysis
Interventional Part: Time to First Occurrence of Kidney Disease Progression or Cardiovascular Death ('as Adjudicated')
registered_primary.timeFrame: From the day of randomisation to the day of the final follow-up visit in the interventional part of the trial, up to 1136 days.

registered_primary.measure: Overall Study: Time to the First Occurrence of Kidney Disease Progression or Cardiovascular Death ('as Adjudicated')
registered_primary.timeFrame: From the day of randomization in the interventional part of the trial until the individual day of end of study in the non-interventional part of the trial. Up to 1869 days.

registered_primary.measure: Number of Participants From Time of Randomization to First Occurrence of Onset of Persistent ≥50% Reduction in eGFR(CKD-EPI); Onset of Persistent eGFR(CKD-EPI) <15mL/Min/1.73m^2; Initiation of Chronic Renal Replacement Therapy; Renal Death; CV Death
Time to the First Occurrence of Any of the Components of the Composite: ≥50% Sustained Decline in eGFR or Reaching ESRD or CV Death or Renal Death.
The First Occurrence of the Composite Endpoint of Onset of Kidney Failure, a Sustained Decrease of eGFR ≥40% From Baseline Over at Least 4 Weeks, or Renal Death
registered_primary.timeFrame: From randomization up until the first occurrence of the primary renal composite endpoint, or censoring at the end of the study, with an average follow-up time of 32 months

registered_primary.measure: Changes in Serum K+ Levels From Baseline
registered_primary.timeFrame: Mean duration of exposure: 227.9 days for Patiromer and 234.5 days for Placebo

registered_primary.measure: Time to First Occurrence of Adjudicated Major Adverse Cardiovascular Event (MACE) During Cardiovascular (CV) Events Follow-up Time Period (Non-inferiority Analysis)
registered_primary.timeFrame: Up to 4.3 person-years for CV follow-up time period

registered_primary.measure: Mean Change From Baseline in Hgb Levels Over the Evaluation Period (Week 28 to Week 52)
registered_primary.timeFrame: Baseline (Pre-dose on Day 1) and evaluation period (Week 28 to Week 52)

registered_primary.measure: Percentage of Participants With > 30% Reduction From Baseline in Mean Predialysis Intact Parathyroid Hormone During the Efficacy Assessment Phase - Non-inferiority Analysis
registered_primary.timeFrame: Baseline and the efficacy assessment phase (EAP; defined as weeks 20 to 27, inclusive).

registered_primary.measure: Presence of a CAC-Adjudicated Catheter-Related Bloodstream Infection (CRBSI) in Subjects Receiving Hemodialysis for the Treatment of End Stage Renal Disease (ESRD): Final Analysis
registered_primary.timeFrame: The event time was the number of days from randomization until the occurrence of a CAC-Adjudicated CRBSI or until the subject was censored. The mean participant duration of exposure to study drug was 174 days (range 4-884 days).

registered_primary.measure: Change From Baseline in Hemoglobin (Hb) to the Average Over the Primary Efficacy Period (Weeks 24 to 36)
Median Time to First Major Adverse Cardiovascular Event (MACE)
The First Occurrence of the Composite Endpoint of Cardiovascular Death, Non-fatal Myocardial Infarction, Non Fatal Stroke, or Hospitalization for Heart Failure.
registered_primary.timeFrame: From randomization up until the first occurrence of the CV composite endpoint, or censoring at the end of the study, with an average study duration of 41 months.

registered_primary.measure: Change From Baseline in HbA1c at Week 26
US (FDA) Submission: Mean Hb Change From Baseline to The Average Level During The Evaluation Period (Weeks 28 to 52), Regardless of Rescue Therapy

Ex-U.S. Submission: Mean Hb Change From Baseline to the Average Weeks 28 to 36, Without Having Received Rescue Therapy Within 6 Weeks Prior to and During This 8-Week Evaluation Period for Participants Enrolled Under the Original Protocol
Change in Hemoglobin (Hb) From Baseline to Week 8
Incidence of Protocol-defined Serious or Severe Hypersensitivity Reactions

Time to First Occurrence of Adjudicated Major Adverse Cardiovascular Event (MACE) During Cardiovascular (CV) Events Follow-up Time Period: Non-inferiority Analysis
registered_primary.timeFrame: Up to 3.9 person-years for CV follow-up time period
